page: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual server belonging to the FXmdsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 6 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a base clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 504.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 42.0 GB per core. It includes 1417 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, with no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities. The server achieves top-tier results in Geekbench single-core and text processing tests, as well as high-speed text generation for small LLM models. Single-threaded compression and decompression tasks also perform strongly. Multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. However, text generation for larger 7B LLM models represents a performance bottleneck, registering in the lower tier. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for accelerated matrix operations.

Given its massive memory allocation relative to compute cores, this server offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring vast memory footprints without needing massive parallel CPU scaling. The combination of a high-frequency Intel Xeon processor, extensive RAM, and local storage makes it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, memory-intensive data processing, and single-threaded analytical workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual server from the FXmdsv2 family, powered by a 12-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on a Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 504.0 GB of RAM, providing an exceptional 42.0 GB of memory per core, alongside 1417 GB of local storage. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmark data highlights top-tier single-core performance, particularly in Geekbench single-core and text processing tests, alongside strong single-threaded compression speeds. However, multi-core benchmarks and large-model LLM text generation remain average or weak. This server is highly optimized for memory-bound workloads, making it an excellent fit for large in-memory databases, caching layers, and high-frequency single-threaded data processing tasks where memory capacity is the primary constraint.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 12 vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and 1417 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure FX24-12mds_v2 is a memory-intensive server with 12 vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 1417 GB local storage, optimized for in-memory databases.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive virtual server featuring exceptional RAM-to-core density and local storage for demanding database workloads.

504.0 GB of RAM providing 42.0 GB per physical core
1417 GB of local storage with premium storage capability
Top-tier single-core and text processing benchmark performance
Supports AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX)
Best suited for in-memory databases and memory-bound analytical tasks
